news.t: Utilities Could Be Better Bets Than Bonds This Year
Global Utilities A Top ETF Buy

holdings.infoBox: JXI is an equity ETF with a total of 92 individual holdings. The top holdings are NextEra Energy stock at 7.94%, Iberdrola at 6.55%, The Southern Company at 4.57%, Duke Energy at 4.31%, and Enel SpA at 3.89%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Utilities ETF (JXI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of companies involved in the utilities industry worldwide. JXI was launched on Sep 12, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: How AI fits into the future of utility stocks
data.text: The utilities sector (XLU) has remained nearly flat year-to-date when compared to the massive gains seen in other sectors in 2024, such as technology. Citi Equity Analyst Ryan Levine believes that the...

data.title: Utilities Could Be Better Bets Than Bonds This Year
data.text: With the Fed and ECB set to lower rates later in 2024, big dividend-paying utilities could thrive.

data.title: Global Utilities A Top ETF Buy
data.text: Going global can help with overall diversification if you know the smart moves to make.
